description: Subprocess invoked without ANTHROPIC_API_KEY must return the friendly missing-secrets payload BEFORE importing the LangChain agent. Deterministic — no LLM call. This is the canary that would have caught the 2026-05-20 regression where 'op inject' returned empty during a network blip and the operator saw 'Could not resolve authentication method' instead of the recovery hint.

Subprocess selftest mode handshakes without importing the LangChain agent or making any API call. Verifies wrapper + venv + env are healthy. Used by slack_bot.py startup self-test (PRINCIPLES.md #31).
Clear skill request with all params → agent stages a YAML proposal. Operator's ✅ reaction then fires the skill's send_tool. Tests the LangChain agent path end-to-end.
input_text: check student participation for c-suites May 2026 INSEAD, all sessions, https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1qGVg0z_xpM7l3RIIMaJtrpDB6daEOxragAPCfOeEp44/edit

description: Off-topic chat must be friendly-redirected, never engaged with (PRINCIPLES.md #16e). The DM agent's allowed_topics list (per #16i) is skill_run_invocation only — jokes, weather, trivia are out of scope.
Ambiguous request — operator named the skill but didn't give the sheet URL or folder. Agent should ASK rather than propose. Catches the regression where the agent fabricates a sheet URL.
